violations.description: Regex assertions are coupled to YAML whitespace/newline formatting, so semantically equivalent formatting changes can trigger false failures.
violations.suggestion: Parse workflow YAML and assert structured fields instead of whitespace-sensitive regex fragments.

recommendations: Keep avoiding hard waits and random/time primitives in assertions.
Prefer parser-based assertions for workflow semantics over formatting-sensitive regex checks.
Continue using deterministic fixture/harness setup for policy checks.
summary: Determinism is strong: no hard waits and no random/time sources detected; one low-severity formatting-coupled regex pattern remains.
